zh.lifeSummary: Catherine de Sommerville是Roger Somerville和Mrs Roger Somerville的女兒，於1370年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾格林代爾。她於1387年與Sir Alexander Cave在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾斯坦福 奧 阿沃結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1402年在英國英格蘭越可爾享年32歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Sommerville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Somerville
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Graveron-Sémerville in Eure (Normandy), from the ancient Germanic personal name Sigimar (see Siemer ) + Old French ville ‘settlement’. The surname was taken to Scotland in the 12th century by William de Somerville, a retainer of David, Earl of Huntingdon, who became King David I of Scotland.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Somacháin (see Summers ) or Mag Shamradháin (see Somers ).

en.lifeSummary: Catherine de Sommerville was born in 1370, in Grindale, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Roger Somerville and Mrs Roger Somerville. She married Sir Alexander Cave in 1387, in Stanford on Avon, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1402, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 32.

Elle a épousé Sir Alexander Cave en 1387, à Stanford on Avon, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1402, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 32 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Catherine de Sommervilleは1370年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアグリンダルでRoger SomervilleとMrs Roger Somervilleの娘として生まれた。1387年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアスタンフォード オン アボンでSir Alexander Caveと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1402年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアで32歳で死去した。

ko.North Cave, East Riding of Yorkshire Uni: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 리딩 노르스 카브
ko.lifeSummary: Catherine de Sommerville(은)는 1370년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 그린데일에서 Roger Somerville(와)과 Mrs Roger Somerville의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1387년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 스탠퍼드  아폰에서 Sir Alexander Cave(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1402년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 32세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Catherine de Sommerville родилась в 1370 г. в местности гриндеил, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. Её родителей звали Roger Somerville и Mrs Roger Somerville. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Alexander Cave в 1387 г. в местности станфорд он авон, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1402 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 32 лет.
